response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY City
PK city_code
ATTR city_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_date : date
ATTR scheduled_departure_time : time
ATTR scheduled_arrival_time : time
ATTR origin_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR destination_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR baggage_belt_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_id
ATTR status_id : integer : PK
ATTR status_name : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusLog
PK log_id
ATTR log_id : integer : PK
ATTR flight_number : varchar : FK
ATTR status_id : integer : FK
ATTR status_change_time : timestamp

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK assignment_id
ATTR assignment_id : integer : PK
ATTR flight_number : varchar : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : FK
ATTR role_type : varchar

REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 0..N : FK=city_code
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=registration_code
REL Flight -> FlightStatusLog : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_number
REL FlightStatusLog -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_id
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1 : FK=crew_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_id
